TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ua-asik, title = Ua-asik, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ua-asik} }

S.FORM: alang Ua-asik ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 112 buwan, 347 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 333 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun89%, Amis1%, Cou1%, Paywan4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ua-asik hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ua-asik hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ua-asik hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ua-asik hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ua-asik hya' ga Lavulan. tay mkyahu' na Ua-asik hya' ga Mizuhu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ua-asik ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 112 buwan, 347 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 333 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 14 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun89%, Amis1%, Cou1%, Paywan4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ua-asik hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ua-asik hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ua-asik hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ua-asik hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ua-asik hya' ga Lavulan. tay mkyahu' na Ua-asik hya' ga Mizuhu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ua-as~ɕik ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun**%, amis~ɕ*%, ʦ~ʨou*%, pajwan*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ua-as~ɕik ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ua-as~ɕik ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ua-as~ɕik ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ua-as~ɕik ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ua-as~ɕik ħjaʔ ɣa la*ulan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ua-as~ɕik ħjaʔ ɣa mizuħu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
